headline: Iran War Spurs Extreme Bear Scenarios for Asia Currencies, Bonds

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on MetLife, Raises Price Target to $93
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Nigel Dally   maintains MetLife (NYSE:MET) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $89 to $93.
